title: HubSpot vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform
comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
